title: Scootsy is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Scootsy is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Scootsy are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scootsy:
Scootsy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
